name: WorldFAIR
description: A global initiative to advance the implementation of FAIR principles across 11 different scientific domains. CDIF was a major output of the WorldFAIR technical track.

name: EOSC Future
description: Supporting the development of the European Open Science Cloud by providing technical interoperability solutions that bridge domain-specific infrastructures.

name: Pilot Initiative
description: A new pilot study exploring cross-domain metadata mappings in the atmospheric sciences.
